summary: The real question is not what the technology can do but what it ought to do. Sarah O’Connor on the people fighting for the future of work
content: The real question is not what the technology can do but what it ought to do. Sarah O’Connor on the people fighting for the future of work
chineseTitle: AI 应该抢走你的工作吗？
